_notes.greeting_morning: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is user display name. ES greetings in this form are gender-neutral.
_notes.notifications_new_singular: [PLURAL] ICU plural applied: singular → '{count} nueva notificación'; plural → '{count} notificaciones nuevas'.

projects.empty_state_body: Crea tu primer proyecto y empieza a construir tu sonido.
projects.project_card_delete_confirm: ¿Eliminar "{project_name}"? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
projects.storage_upgrade_prompt: Usas el {percent}% de tu almacenamiento. {upgrade_link} para conseguir más.
projects.storage_almost_full: Almacenamiento casi lleno — mejora tu plan

_notes.project_card_bpm_label: BPM = Beats Per Minute. Universal abbreviation — kept as 'BPM' in all locales.
_notes.project_card_key_label: Musical key indicator. Short label — kept concise as 'Tonalidad'.
_notes.project_card_last_edited: [PLACEHOLDER] {time_ago} is a relative time string generated at runtime.
_notes.project_card_delete_confirm: [PLACEHOLDER] {project_name} is user-generated content. Opening ¿ and curly quotes adapted to ES typographic conventions.
_notes.storage_upgrade_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {percent} is an integer. {upgrade_link} is an inline hyperlink.

_notes.field_bpm_label: BPM kept as universal abbreviation. 'Tempo' localised.
_notes.template_singer_songwriter: Used gender-inclusive 'Cantautor/a' to avoid gender assumption.
_notes.template_film_score: 'Banda sonora' is the standard ES term for a film score, distinct from a rating.
_notes.template_sound_design: [REVIEW] Anglicism 'Sound design' retained per source note recommendation. Term not found as standalone entry in ontology — confirm approved es-ES form with localization lead.

studio.ai_composition_hint: Genera melodías, progresiones de acordes y patrones de batería con la IA de ECHOCRAFT.

_notes.track_type_midi: MIDI is a technical acronym — kept as-is. 'track' localised as 'pista' per market terminology rules.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saving: Trailing ellipsis (…) preserved to indicate loading state.
_notes.toolbar_save_status_saved: Shortened to 'Todo guardado' to fit status bar space constraints.
_notes.toolbar_loop: 'Loop' retained as anglicism — standard term in Spanish music production.
_notes.ai_composition_label: Matches onboarding and nav 'Composición con IA' exactly.
_notes.ai_composition_hint: IA presented as a tool ('con la IA de ECHOCRAFT'), not as the creator, per market voice rules.
